scenario.name: missing_artifact
scenario.trigger: An artifact in the validation list does not exist at the specified path.

required_actions.action: Mark the artifact as MISSING in the report.
Document which checks could not run due to the missing artifact (e.g., "Traceability check: PRD missing — cannot trace requirements").
Proceed with validation of remaining artifacts.
Include MISSING artifacts in the report summary with clear impact.

prohibited_actions.action: Do not invent or assume artifact content.
Do not skip reporting the missing artifact.

scenario.name: incomplete_artifact
scenario.trigger: An artifact exists but has placeholder content, empty sections, or is clearly unfinished.

required_actions.action: Flag the artifact as INCOMPLETE in the report.
Cite specific sections that are placeholder or empty.
Classify as WARNING (incomplete blocks quality) or INFO (minor gaps) based on impact.

scenario.name: contradictory_findings
scenario.trigger: During validation, initial analysis suggests a conflict, but re-checking reveals the conflict may not exist or is ambiguous.

required_actions.action: Re-read both documents at the cited locations.
Verify the conflict is real (different contexts, different scopes can explain apparent contradictions).
If conflict is confirmed, report with specific citations and resolution suggestion.
If conflict is not confirmed, do not report. Avoid false positives.

scenario.name: artifact_too_large
scenario.trigger: An artifact is too large to read in full (e.g., very long document, binary, or complex structure).

required_actions.action: Summarize key sections relevant to validation (e.g., requirements, architecture components, user stories).
Run validation on the summarized/key sections.
Document in the report: "Artifact X was summarized for validation due to size. Key sections validated: [list]."
Note any validation limitations due to summarization.

prohibited_actions.action: Do not skip the artifact entirely without attempting to validate key sections.
Do not report findings on sections that were not actually read.
